info.name: Spring Best Practices - Destinations API
info.description:
OWASP Top 10 (2021) security test coverage across all four endpoints.

The collection pre-request script generates a fresh HS256 JWT before every request.
Requests that need a specific token state (expired, tampered, alg:none) override the
collection variable in their own pre-request script or use a hard-coded value.

Endpoints:
  POST   /api/destinations/add
  DELETE /api/destinations/{countryName}/{cityName}
  POST   /api/destinations/verify
  GET    /api/destinations

OWASP categories covered:
  A01  Broken Access Control
  A02  Cryptographic Failures       — alg:none JWT bypass
  A03  Injection                    — SQL, XSS, path traversal, SSTI
  A05  Security Misconfiguration    — hardened response headers
  A07  Identification & Auth        — tampered / expired tokens
  A08  Software & Data Integrity    — mass assignment via extra JSON fields

Run order matters for state-dependent tests:
  1. POST /add — Happy path (creates France/Paris and Germany/Berlin)
  2. POST /verify and GET can run at any point after step 1
  3. DELETE — Happy path (removes France/Paris)

variable.description: Populated automatically by the collection pre-request script.

exec: // Generates a fresh HS256 JWT signed with the dev secret from application.yaml.
// Runs before every request — requests testing auth failures override this in their
// own pre-request script or pass a hard-coded token value directly.
const payload = base64url(JSON.stringify({ sub: 'postman-user', iat: now, exp: now + 300 }));

request.description: Happy path. Expects 201 with the saved destination in the response body.
dateFrom equals dateTo. Same-day trips are valid and should return 201.
A01 Broken Access Control — Authorization header is absent. Unauthenticated requests must be rejected with 401, not redirected to a login page.

A02/A07 — JWT header specifies alg:none with no signature (trailing dot marks the empty signature segment). A vulnerable server that accepts unsigned tokens would allow unauthenticated access. Expects 401.
A07 — Valid header+payload but signature is replaced with garbage. Expects 401.

exec: // Override the collection-level token with one that is already expired (exp = now - 300).
const payload = base64url(JSON.stringify({ sub: 'postman-user', iat: now - 600, exp: now - 300 }));

request.description: A07 — Correctly signed token using the real dev secret, but exp is 5 minutes in the past. The pre-request script generates the expired token at run time so the signature is always valid. Expects 401.
A03 Injection — Classic SQL injection payload. The @Pattern constraint (^[a-zA-Z '-]+$) rejects = and digits before the value reaches any persistence layer. Expects 400.
A03 Injection — XSS payload in countryName. The @Pattern constraint rejects < and > before persistence. Expects 400.
A03 Injection — Path traversal attempt in cityName. The @Pattern constraint rejects . and /. Expects 400.

exec: pm.test("Response body does not evaluate SSTI", () => {

request.description: A03 Injection — SSTI probe: if a template engine evaluated ${7*7} it would return 49. The @Pattern constraint rejects $, {, and } before any evaluation. Expects 400.

item.name: A08 | Mass assignment — extra fields ignored (201)

exec: pm.test("Injected id not reflected in response", () => {

request.description: A08 Software and Data Integrity Failures — extra undeclared fields (id, internalFlag, role) in the request body. Jackson ignores unknown properties, preventing mass assignment. The response must not echo or apply the injected values. Expects 201.
countryName is blank. Expects 400 with countryName listed in fieldErrors.
countryName is 101 characters, one over the @Size(max=100) limit. Expects 400.
dateFrom and dateTo are absent. Expects 400 with both fields listed in fieldErrors.
Passes Bean Validation but fails ISO 3166-1 lookup in LocationValidationService. Expects 422 with appErrorCode 415.
Single-character city passes @Pattern but fails the length >= 2 check in LocationValidationService. Expects 422 with appErrorCode 416.
dateFrom is later than dateTo. Expects 422 with appErrorCode 417.
Date range spans more than 366 days. Expects 400 with appErrorCode 420.
Run after 'Happy path — valid'. France/Paris already exists. Expects 409 with appErrorCode 418.
Happy path. Run after 'POST /add — Happy path' to ensure France/Paris exists. Expects 200 with the removed destination.
A01 Broken Access Control — no Authorization header. Expects 401.
A07 — Tampered JWT signature. Expects 401.

item.name: A03 | SQL injection in countryName path variable (400)

request.description: A03 Injection — SQL injection payload in the countryName path variable. The @Pattern constraint on the @PathVariable rejects =, digits, and other non-alpha chars before the value reaches any persistence layer. Expects 400.

item.name: A03 | XSS in countryName path variable (400)

request.description: A03 Injection — URL-encoded XSS payload in countryName path variable. After URL-decoding the @Pattern constraint rejects < and >. Expects 400.
A03 Injection — Path traversal probe using URL-encoded slashes in cityName. The container rejects encoded path separators; if decoded, @Pattern rejects . and /. Must not return 200.
Country and city combination does not exist. Expects 404 with appErrorCode 419.
Happy path. Run after 'POST /add — Happy path'. Expects 200.
A01 — No Authorization header. Expects 401.
A07 — Tampered JWT signature. Expects 401.
A03 — SQL injection payload. @Pattern rejects = and digits. Expects 400.
A03 — Attribute-injection XSS probe. @Pattern rejects < and >. Expects 400.

item.name: A08 | Mass assignment — extra fields ignored (200)

request.description: A08 — Extra undeclared fields (role, internalFlag) in request body. Jackson ignores them; they must not appear in the response or affect server-side state.

item.name: Happy path — list in date range (200)

request.description: Happy path. Returns all destinations whose date range overlaps with the query window.
A01 — No Authorization header. Expects 401.
A07 — Tampered JWT signature. Expects 401.

item.name: A03 | SQL injection in dateFrom param (400)

request.description: A03 Injection — SQL injection payload in the dateFrom query parameter. LocalDate parsing fails immediately (MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException → 400). The payload never reaches the repository layer.
dateFrom is later than dateTo. Expects 422 with appErrorCode 417.
Date span is more than 366 days. Expects 400 with appErrorCode 420.
Required dateFrom query parameter is absent. MissingServletRequestParameterException → 400 with fieldErrors listing dateFrom.

item.name: A05 | Hardened response headers on authenticated request

exec: pm.test("Cache-Control prevents caching of sensitive data (A05)", () => {

request.description:
A05 Security Misconfiguration — verifies Spring Security's hardened header set is present on every response:
  X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff   — prevents MIME-type sniffing
  Strict-Transport-Security          — enforces HTTPS for future requests
  X-Frame-Options: DENY              — prevents clickjacking
  Cache-Control: no-store            — prevents caching of sensitive API responses

item.name: A05/A09 | 401 response exposes no server fingerprint

exec: pm.test("Server header does not reveal version (A05)", () => {
pm.test("No Java stack trace in error body (A09)", () => {

request.description: A05/A09 — Even error responses must not leak server version (X-Powered-By, verbose Server header) or internal detail (stack traces, exception class names). Fires an unauthenticated request to trigger a 401 and inspects the response headers and body.
